description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker with a distinctive design featuring a white upper with bold black paneling and a cream-colored toe and lower side area. The shoe has a prominent, thick black outsole with a textured tread for grip, and a white midsole that wraps around the base. The upper is constructed with multiple white overlays and black underlays, creating a striking contrast, and is secured with white laces threaded through a series of eyelets. The heel area is reinforced and displays a small, stylized black marking or logo. The overall build suggests a comfortable, supportive fit suitable for urban environments and active use.
description: A high-top sneaker with a white and black upper, cream toe, and thick black sole, featuring white laces and a small heel logo.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white overlays, black underlays, cream toe, and a small black logo on the heel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white laces, black tongue, and cream toe cap.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar white and black paneling and cream toe, no visible logo.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the reinforced white heel, cream accent, and small black logo.
attribute_logo: small black stylized marking on the heel
